docket_entries.description: HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUKES-BLAKE, LIZZETTE , AN INDIVIDUAL HEARING SET FOR OCT-09-2024 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT.
